The liver [filters] toxins and [removes] harmful substances from the blood, which is critical for muscle health. It [supplies] the body with oxygen and [supports] the muscular system's ability to function efficiently. The liver [regulates] the flow of blood to muscles and [ensures] that muscles receive the necessary nutrients for optimal performance. The liver [works] closely with the muscular system to maintain overall health and [supports] the body's ability to move and function effectively.
